body.title: D327 Phase 4: sweep model name references from codebase
body.result: Swept model names from 16 files. OR_CHEAP_MODEL + OR_INTERACTIVE_MODEL constants in inference_openrouter.py. OLLAMA_HOST/OLLAMA_LOCAL_MODEL via inference_ollama.py. 32 remaining refs are comments, DB defaults, .env templates. 1875 tests pass.
body.description: Audit and remove 100+ hardcoded model names from main.py, server.py, seeds, etc. Replace with tier references through inference_gateway. Model IDs in cfg only.
